description: Programming solutions, DSA, algorithms, mini-projects and scripts by Md Akhinoor Islam

programs.title: Two Sum trejfkgv gfvlh,gv hgljhv
programs.description: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target. You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution, and you may not use the same element twice. You can return the answer in any order.
programs.approach: HashMap single pass — for each number, store its complement (target - n) as key. Check if current number already exists as a key.

programs.title: Maximum Subarray
programs.description: Given an integer array nums, find the subarray with the largest sum, and return its sum. A subarray is a contiguous non-empty sequence of elements within an array.

examples.explanation: The subarray [4,-1,2,1] has the largest sum 6.
The subarray is [1] which has the sum 1.
The subarray [5,4,-1,7,8] has the largest sum 23.

programs.approach: Kadane's Algorithm — track current running sum and global max. If current sum goes negative, reset to current element.
programs.code:
def maxSubArray(nums):
    max_sum = nums[0]
    curr_sum = nums[0]
    for n in nums[1:]:
        curr_sum = max(n, curr_sum + n)
        max_sum = max(max_sum, curr_sum)
    return max_sum

nums = list(map(int, input().strip('[]').split(',')))
print(maxSubArray(nums))

python.code:
def maxSubArray(nums):
    max_sum = nums[0]
    curr_sum = nums[0]
    for n in nums[1:]:
        curr_sum = max(n, curr_sum + n)
        max_sum = max(max_sum, curr_sum)
    return max_sum

nums = list(map(int, input().strip('[]').split(',')))
print(maxSubArray(nums))

explanation.title: Initialize Variables
explanation.text: Start with the first element as both max_sum and curr_sum. This handles the case of single-element arrays.

explanation.title: Kadane's Core Logic
explanation.text: For each element, decide: should we extend the current subarray or start fresh? curr_sum = max(current element alone, current element + previous sum). This is the essence of Kadane's algorithm.
explanation.insight: At each position, we either continue the subarray or start a new one. Starting fresh when curr_sum becomes negative is the key optimization.

explanation.title: Track Maximum
explanation.text: Update max_sum whenever we find a larger subarray sum. The final max_sum is our answer.

explanation.title: Kadane's Algorithm in JavaScript
explanation.text: Same algorithm as Python version: track current sum and maximum sum, deciding at each step whether to extend or restart the subarray.
explanation.insight: Classic DP problem that can be solved in O(n) time and O(1) space using Kadane's algorithm

programs.notes: Kadane's Algorithm is the key pattern here. The subarray [4,-1,2,1] has the largest sum = 6.
